document_analysis.purpose: Business plan for second-hand marketplace platform

error_patterns.name: Overwriting existing document work
error_patterns.description: Creating new version instead of modifying existing well-written document
error_patterns.context: User identified this as the best Treqe document
detection_signals: Creating new file with similar name
Not checking if existing document is already good
Not asking 'should I modify or create new?'
error_patterns.prevention_suggestion: Always check if document exists and is already good before creating new version

error_patterns.name: Inventing non-existent information
error_patterns.description: Creating CVs, study data, or other information that doesn't exist
error_patterns.context: User corrected invented content in annexes
error_patterns.prevention_suggestion: Only include verifiable information, specify what needs to be created vs what exists

error_patterns.name: Inconsistent document versions
error_patterns.context: Multiple Treqe documents created during development
detection_signals: User confusion about which version is current
error_patterns.prevention_suggestion: Maintain clear versioning system, document changes between versions

optimization_suggestions.suggestion: Add table of contents with page numbers
Include sensitivity analysis for key assumptions

optimization_suggestions.benefit: Makes data more accessible and persuasive

optimization_suggestions.suggestion: Include SWOT analysis (Strengths, Weaknesses, Opportunities, Threats)

questions: What assumptions are we making about the second-hand market?
What's missing from the competitive analysis?
insights: Challenge assumption that users want complex barter system
Explore hidden market segments not addressed

questions: How could this business model fail?
What's the weakest link in the operational plan?
What happens if a major competitor responds aggressively?
insights: Stress-test chicken-and-egg problem for platform adoption
Test financial projections under adverse scenarios

questions: What patterns exist in successful marketplace platforms?
How have similar startups failed or succeeded?
What regulatory patterns affect second-hand markets?
insights: Identify common success factors in platform businesses
Recognize regulatory trends in digital marketplaces

questions: How does this business plan connect to broader economic trends?
How does this fit with circular economy initiatives?
insights: Connect to sustainability and circular economy trends
Consider platform effects on local economies
Integrate with digital payment ecosystem trends

phases.expected_impact: Ready for investor presentations, comprehensive due diligence
